steps.title: Total points of all 8 players
steps.content:
The total points scored by all 8 players is the mean multiplied by the number of players:
$$8 \times 16.5 = 132$$

steps.title: Highest score after removal
steps.content:
The sum of the remaining 7 players after removing the highest score is $$7 \times 14 = 98$$.
Subtracting this from the total gives the highest score: $$132 - 98 = 34$$.
That matches Choice C — 34- C.
